## Beta v0.9 RC

**Date:** YYYY-MM-DD  
**Commit:**  
**Deployment:**  
**Prod:** https://ai-startup-validation-tau.vercel.app

### What's New

- Open Beta UX polish (contrast, error pages, skeletons, mobile nav)
- Beta badge v0.9, feedback footer, activation funnel analytics
- OpenRouter + Gemini Flash AI workflow (Research → Decision → Report)

### Bug Fixes

- OAuth error messages (cancelled / session / network)
- Dark mode contrast on landing sections
- Dashboard / wizard responsive padding

### Known Issues

See [KNOWN_ISSUES.md](../KNOWN_ISSUES.md).

### Limitations

- Browser Agent and MCP not yet live (post-beta roadmap)
- OpenAI fallback optional; OpenRouter primary
- Some locale strings incomplete outside ko/en
